evidence: frontend/src/App.tsx — route nested under ProtectedRoute with requiresAuth handle meta
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx — passes pageBubbleId bTHDh via settingsShellProps to DashboardLayout
frontend/src/components/DashboardLayout.tsx — applies data-bubble-id bTHDh on shell root when pageBubbleId provided
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx — passes headerBubbleId and sidebarBubbleId to DashboardLayout
frontend/src/components/DashboardLayout.tsx — forwards instance ids to Header and AppSidebar
frontend/src/components/shell/Header.tsx — data-bubble-id={bubbleId} with settings override (defaults ai_RNbBKLUc)
frontend/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx — data-bubble-id={bubbleId} on Sidebar root with settings override (defaults ai_RNbBKLUe)
ir/inventory.json — ai_RNbBKLUp and ai_RNbBKLUq are CustomElement children of bTHDh per bTHDl____root.json
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx — prototype settings UI wrapped in div with data-bubble-id ai_RNbBHYUr and data-module-owner MOD-DRSAM-SETTINGS

frontend/src/lib/settings/settingsTabStub.ts — exports SETTINGS_TAB_CUSTOM_STATE_KEY (settings_tab_os_), ENUM-01 tab slugs/order, tab button bubble ids (ai_RNbBHYUx–ai_RNbBHYVE), SETTINGS_TAB_PANELS_BUBBLE_ID, and SettingsTabRouter contract for SET-01
ir/inventory.json — ai_RNbBHYUr is Group child of bTHDh; custom_state:bTHDh:settings_tab_os_ present in slice

functional_audit.check: /settings route registered and auth-guarded via ProtectedRoute parent
Settings page mounts AppShellLayout (DashboardLayout) with page-level CustomElement instance overrides
Settings content renders inside ai_RNbBHYUr boundary; settings_tab_os_ tab router stub exported and tab UI deferred to MOD-DRSAM-SETTINGS
evidence: ir/inventory.json — custom_state:bTHDh:settings_tab_os_ present in slice but not wired in shell scope

ui_evidence.notes: Page root on DashboardLayout outer wrapper when Settings passes pageBubbleId
Settings-specific header CustomElement instance on Header via bubbleId override
Settings-specific sidebar CustomElement instance on AppSidebar via bubbleId override
settings-main content boundary wraps page children with data-module-owner MOD-DRSAM-SETTINGS

gaps.finding: IR places ai_RNbBKLUp, ai_RNbBKLUq, and ai_RNbBHYUr as bTHDh siblings; React shell still nests Header inside the main column to the right of the sidebar (inherited from SHELL-05). Page-instance markers are correct but full-width header sibling layout remains unresolved.

critiques.finding: SHELL-09 added correct page-instance bubble ids (ai_RNbBKLUp/ai_RNbBKLUq) but did not restructure DashboardLayout to match bTHDl sibling order (full-width header above sidebar+main row). Header remains nested in the right column per SHELL-05 shadcn SidebarProvider pattern.
critiques.alternative: Restructure DashboardLayout: offline banner → full-width Header (page instance) → flex row (sidebar instance | scrollable main containing only ai_RNbBHYUr children), aligning DOM hierarchy with IR page-root siblings.

critiques.finding: Decompose scope defers settings tabs, panels, and admin popups to MOD-DRSAM-SETTINGS, but brownfield implementation retains full prototype profile/subscription/logout UI inside ai_RNbBHYUr. Ownership marker (data-module-owner) and settings-main boundary are present; tab bar (ai_RNbBHYUx–ai_RNbBHYVE) and conditional panels are correctly deferred.
critiques.alternative: If strict shell-only landing is required, replace prototype settings cards with a minimal placeholder inside ai_RNbBHYUr until SET-01+ lands; otherwise document brownfield retention as intentional in coverage preflight.

critiques.finding: frontend/src/lib/settings/routes.ts exports SETTINGS_ROUTE but authenticatedRoutes.tsx still hardcodes '/settings' string instead of importing the constant.
critiques.alternative: Import SETTINGS_ROUTE in authenticatedRoutes.tsx (and any navigate targets) for single source of truth.
